zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Haute於1430年出生在英國英格蘭肯特沃爾坦時，他的父親William Haute40歲，母親Joan Woodville25歲。他於1451年與Joan Horne在英國英格蘭肯特比曉普斯同結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1497年7月2日在英國肯特享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Haute于1430年出生在英国英格兰肯特沃爾坦时，他的父亲William Haute40岁，母亲Joan Woodville25岁。他于1451年与Joan Horne在英国英格兰肯特比曉普斯同结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1497年7月2日在英国肯特享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Haute
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: nickname or status name from an argot word (thieves’ slang) in Bavaria and Austria for a peasant farmer (see   Hotz   1). Compare   Houts   and   Houtz  .

variants.name: Hotz
meanings: South German and Swiss German: from thieves' cant for a peasant or farmer, which in turn derives from an ancient Germanic personal name, Hugizo or Huzo, pet forms of a compound name formed with hug- as the first element (see, for example, Hubert , Hugh ).
South German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German hotzen ‘to run swiftly’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Haute was born in 1430, in Waltham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Haute, was 40 and his mother, Joan Woodville, was 25. He married Joan Horne in 1451, in Bishopstone, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 2 July 1497, in Kent, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Haute est né en 1430, à Waltham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Haute, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Joan Woodville, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joan Horne en 1451, à Bishopstone, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 2 juillet 1497, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Haute 1430 in Waltham, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Haute 40 und seine Mutter Joan Woodville 25. Er hat 1451 in Bishopstone, Kent, England, United Kingdom Joan Horne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Juli 1497 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Kent, England und wurde in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Haute è nato il nel 1430 nel Waltham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Haute, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Joan Woodville, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joan Horne nel 1451, nel Bishopstone, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 2 luglio 1497, nel Kent, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Hauteが1430年にイギリスイギリスケントワルサムで生まれた時，父William Hauteは40歳，母Joan Woodvilleは25歳であった。1451年にイギリスイギリスケントビショプストーンでJoan Horneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1497年7月2日にイギリスケントで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Haute(이)가 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 월섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Haute(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Woodville(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1451년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 비숍스톤에서 Joan Horne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1497년 7월 2일 영국 켄트에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Haute nasceu em 1430, em Waltham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Haute, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Joan Woodville, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Horne em 1451, em Bishopstone, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de julho de 1497, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Haute родился в 1430 г. в местности валтам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Haute было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Woodville, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Horne в 1451 г. в местности бишопстоун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 2 июля 1497 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Haute nació en 1430, en Waltham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Haute, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Joan Woodville, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Joan Horne en 1451, en Bishopstone, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 2 de julio de 1497, en Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
